plugins.prepareCmd: sed -i "s/version = .*/version = '${nextRelease.version}'/g" back/build.gradle && npm --prefix front --no-git-tag-version version ${nextRelease.version} && docker build --target front -t ghcr.io/$OWNER_LC/orion-microcrm-front:${nextRelease.version} . && docker build --target back -t ghcr.io/$OWNER_LC/orion-microcrm-back:${nextRelease.version} .
